meta.title: BIR (Philippines) Tax Types and Alphanumeric Tax Codes (ATC)

classifications.vat: Output VAT industry codes - Form 2550Q (2550M optional since 2023)
classifications.fwt: Final withholding tax incl. fringe benefits - Forms 0619-F, 1601-FQ, 1604-F, 1603Q; certificate 2306
classifications.percentage_wt: Percentage taxes withheld/remitted at source - Forms 1600-PT, 2552; certificate 2307

sources: RR 2-98 as amended by RR 11-2018 (EWT/FWT rates)
BIR Form 1603Q Jan 2018 ENCS (fringe benefit ATCs)
meta.disclaimer: Reference compilation, not tax advice. Verify against current eBIRForms/eFPS dropdowns and the taxpayer's BIR Form 2303 before production use.

tax_types.name: Withholding Tax - Compensation
tax_types.notes: Graduated withholding table (0%-35%); no per-transaction ATC

tax_types.name: Withholding Tax - Banks and Other Financial Institutions
tax_types.notes: Final taxes withheld by banks/FIs on interest, etc.

tax_types.name: Withholding Tax - Fringe Benefits
tax_types.notes: ATCs WF360 (35%) and WF330 (25%) - see 'Final WT ATCs' sheet

tax_types.name: Withholding Tax - Percentage Tax on Winnings and Prizes
tax_types.notes: Operators of horse race tracks, etc.

tax_types.name: Withholding Tax - Others (one-time transactions not subject to CGT; sale/transfer of real property other than capital assets)
Withholding Tax - VAT and Other Percentage Taxes
Capital Gains Tax - Real Property (capital asset)
tax_types.notes: 6% of selling price or zonal/FMV, whichever is higher

tax_types.name: Capital Gains Tax - Stocks (shares not traded on the stock exchange)
Improperly Accumulated Earnings Tax
tax_types.notes: REPEALED by CREATE (RA 11534), eff. Apr 2021 - historical only

tax_types.name: Percentage Tax - Quarterly
tax_types.notes: Sec. 116 rate: 3% (was temporarily 1% Jul 2020 - Jun 2023 under CREATE)

tax_types.name: Percentage Tax - Monthly
tax_types.notes: Monthly filing phased out under TRAIN; percentage tax is now quarterly (2551Q)

tax_types.name: Percentage Tax - Stock (IPO)
tax_types.notes: IPO tax (Sec. 127(B)) repealed by Bayanihan 2 (RA 11494, Sep 2020)

tax_types.name: Percentage Tax - Stocks (Stock Transaction Tax)
tax_types.notes: Now 0.1% under CMEPA (RA 12214, eff. 1 Jul 2025); was 0.6% under TRAIN

tax_types.name: Donor's Tax
tax_types.notes: 6% flat on total gifts above P250,000 per year under TRAIN
